stock_name: The name of the company or organization whose stock information is being represented.
industry_type: The industry category the company belongs to, such as Tech, Retail, or Finance.
stock_cap: Indicates the market capitalization size of the company (large, mid, small).
current_stock_price: The latest trading price of the company's stock.
stock_sentiment_value: Denotes market sentiment towards the stock, rated on a scale from 1 (poor) to 5 (excellent).
last_3_months_gain: Percentage gain or loss of the stock price over the past three months.
last_6_months_gain: Percentage gain or loss of the stock price over the past six months.
last_1_year_gain: Percentage gain or loss of the stock price over the past twelve months.
moving_average_30_days: The average stock price over the last 30 days, reflecting the short-term trend.
